{{Quote|Not a word coming out of there. But if they were planning anything, they wouldn't tell CSF. Word is that Shevu is seriously hacked off with his way of doing business, too.|Gefal Keb discussing the Galactic Alliance Guard and Jacen Solo|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref>}}
'''Gefal Keb''' was a [[Gossam/Legends|Gossam]] senior civil servant in the [[Galactic Alliance Department of Public Protection|Public Protection Department]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] government on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], Keb provided [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cha Niathal]] with information from the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] (CSF) on threats to the GA or other internal intelligence.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
